content.speakerText: Could I get a receipt for my expenses?
content.speakerTextCn: 能给我一张报销用的收据吗？

options.text: Could I get a receipt for my expenses?

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了礼貌请求句型 'Could I get...'，这是该场景中最得体的表达方式。选项1和3语气生硬，不符合礼貌索要的语境；选项4虽语法正确，但属于一般性询问，未明确说明用途（用于报销），不如正确答案精准。

content.speakerText: Can you put my company name on it? It's ABC Corp.
content.speakerTextCn: 能写上我公司名字吗？是ABC公司。

options.text: Can you put ABC Corp. on the receipt?
I want my company name written.
Do you know my company name?

content.explanation: 正确答案直接提供公司名称，符合使用说明中'直接说公司名，别用My company is...'的要求。选项1违反了场景指导原则，显得冗余；选项3语气生硬且不完整；选项4是疑问句，未提供必要信息，无法促成动作。

content.speakerText: I just paid for my hotel stay. Could I have a receipt for accounting purposes?
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚支付了酒店费用，能给我一张用于财务报销的收据吗？

options.text: Sure, I'll email it to you.
I don't have any receipts left.

content.explanation: 正确答案是积极回应并提供解决方案，符合服务场景的礼貌与效率原则。选项2直接拒绝，缺乏服务意识；选项3质疑对方需求，显得不专业；选项4语气冷漠，不符合职场礼仪。

content.template: Could I get ___ receipt for my expenses?
content.hint: 表示泛指的一张收据，用不定冠词
content.knowledgePoint: 冠词用法（a receipt 表示泛指）

content.template: Could you please put ___ name on it? It's ABC Corp.
content.hint: 表达'我的公司名字'，用完整短语更自然

content.template: I'd like ___ receipt for reimbursement. Could you ___ it to me by email?
content.hint: 第一空：泛指一张收据；第二空：电子方式交付收据的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（send by email）与冠词用法

content.speakerText: Could I get a receipt for my expenses?
content.speakerTextCn: 能给我一张报销用的收据吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! I'll email it to you.
Sure thing — would you prefer a printed copy or an email?
Absolutely, I'll generate one right away.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应了索要收据的请求
语言准确性：语法正确，无拼写或时态错误
表达自然度：使用符合服务场景的礼貌表达
关键词覆盖：包含 receipt, email/print 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: Can you put my company name on it? It's ABC Corp.
content.speakerTextCn: 能写上我公司名字吗？是ABC公司。
expectedAnswers: No problem, I'll add ABC Corp. right away.
Got it — ABC Corp. will be on the receipt.
Sure, I'll make sure ABC Corp. is clearly printed.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确理解并确认公司名称的添加要求
语言准确性：正确使用动词短语如 'add', 'put on', 'make sure'
表达自然度：语气友好，符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：明确包含公司名称 'ABC Corp.' 且未使用 'My company is...' 结构

content.speakerText: I paid for the dinner with my corporate card. Could you include the tax ID on the receipt?
content.speakerTextCn: 我用公司卡支付了晚餐，能在收据上加上税号吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course, I'll add your tax ID right away.
No issue — I'll update the receipt with your tax ID and email it.
Sure thing. Please confirm the tax ID so I can enter it correctly.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整回应了添加税号的特殊要求
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词如 'add', 'update', 'enter'，语法正确
表达自然度：语气专业且主动提供解决方案
关键词覆盖：包含 tax ID, receipt, email 等场景关键词
